title: buildah image for v1.11.4
body: Quesion: I am looking for buildah v1.11.4 container image, can't locate the mentioned tag at https://quay.io/repository/buildah/stable?tab=tags , am I looking at right place?

comments.body: @navidshaikh you're indeed looking in the right place.  I've been negligent in getting that out, and in fact 1.11.5 just released yesterday.  I'll try to get at least 1.11.4 out by the end of the week.  Thanks for the nudge!

@navidshaikh I've just posted quay.io/buildah/stable:v1.11.4 on the repository.  Thanks again for the reminder and apologies for the delay.  

I'm going to close this issue.
